positive: A minimalist, geometric illustration featuring a playful, stylized fox silhouette curled up in a bed of abstract autumnal foliage. The scene should utilize a limited color palette of deep burnt orange, sage green, terracotta, and muted cream. The style must be high-contrast, modern flat vector art with clean, thick outlines. The composition should be perfectly centered and designed to look excellent as a large-scale, seamless print on fabric. Include subtle, decorative leaf vein patterns and stylized forest elements in the background, maintaining negative space. Focus on symmetry and bold shapes. Artwork must be highly stylized and whimsical, reminiscent of modern Nordic design.
negative: low resolution, grain, blurry, watermark, text, signature, poor anatomy, abstract, realistic, photorealistic, noisy, artifact, asymmetrical, logos, human, messy, dark contrast
